# Outlook Power Tools

Chrome extension that adds ad blocker, email templates, save email as PDF, quick steps, keyboard shortcuts, unread badge, and attachment reminder to New Outlook (OWA).

## Problem

Microsoft removed or limited several productivity features when transitioning to New Outlook:
- Quick Steps with custom email templates (new email, reply with template)
- Custom keyboard shortcuts for email actions
- Reliable attachment reminder
- No built-in ad blocker for free Outlook accounts
- No one-click PDF export for emails
- No unread count badge on browser tab

Outlook Power Tools is a Chrome extension that restores these features and adds new ones directly in the browser.

## Features

### Ad Blocker (Free)
Removes sidebar ads, fake email ads that look like real messages, "Upgrade to Premium" banners, and "Ad Choices" labels. Works automatically on all Outlook web domains. Toggle on/off in extension settings.

### Email Templates (Free + Pro)
Save any email as a reusable template with subject line, body text, and recipients. 15 built-in templates included across 5 categories: Acknowledgment, Follow-up, Scheduling, Out of Office, and Support. Insert into compose with two clicks from the dropdown or popup.

### Save Email as PDF (Free + Pro)
Export any open email to PDF directly from the toolbar. Free users get the browser print dialog with "Save as PDF" option. Pro users get one-click auto-download — file saves directly to Downloads folder without any dialog.

### Quick Steps (Free + Pro)
Chain multiple email actions into a single click. Supported actions: mark as read, move to folder, flag, unflag, forward to, reply with template, delete. Create custom combos like "Mark as read + Move to Archive" and trigger them from the toolbar.

### Keyboard Shortcuts (Free + Pro)
Record any key combination (Ctrl+Shift+T, etc.) and bind it to insert a template, trigger a quick step, or perform native Outlook actions (reply, archive, flag, move to folder, new mail, mark as read).

### Unread Count Badge (Free)
Displays the number of unread emails on the browser tab favicon, in the page title (e.g., "(3) Mail - Outlook"), and on the extension icon in Chrome toolbar. Updates automatically when new emails arrive or existing ones are read.

### Attachment Reminder (Free)
Detects when you mention "attached", "attachment", "file", or similar keywords in English and Russian, then warns you before sending if no attachment is present. Prevents embarrassing "forgot the file" situations.

## Pricing

- Free: ad blocker, unread badge, attachment reminder, 15 built-in templates, 3 custom templates, 3 quick steps, 3 keyboard shortcuts, PDF export via print dialog
- Pro Monthly: $3.99/month (cancel anytime)
- Pro Yearly: $29.99/year (save 37%)

## Technical Details

- Chrome Extension Manifest V3
- Version: 1.1.0
- Works on: outlook.live.com, outlook.office.com, outlook.office365.com
- Compatible with any Chromium-based browser
- Data stored locally in chrome.storage.sync (synced across devices via Google account)
- No email content is read, stored, or transmitted
- Anonymous usage analytics only (feature usage counts, no PII)
- Payment processing via Stripe (extension does not handle payment data)
